Nothing has been deleted. These are candidates only — confirm which categories to remove. Basic lands & vanilla creatures (no text but real cards) are NOT listed here and will be kept.

Art Series cards 2243

Scryfall “Art Series” printings (oversized art, type line “Card // Card”). Not playable Magic cards. Recommended: discard.

Placeholder / helper objects 7

Objects with type line “Card” (Poison Counter, Red Mana, Storm Counter, substitute cards). Not real game cards. Recommended: discard.

Token objects 1274

Token / double-faced-token printings. In this app tokens are created via the token drawer during play, not shuffled into decks — so they don't need per-card deck rules. Review: keep as token art, but exclude from the card-authoring pool?
